name: Birdie Bays Indoor Golf Simulators
about: Birdie Bays Indoor Golf Simulators offers an indoor golf experience in Victoria, featuring state-of-the-art simulators for year-round play. The facility combines cutting-edge technology with a vibrant, high-energy atmosphere, including bright neon colors and immersive lighting, to provide a unique entertainment venue. Services include golf lessons, private events, leagues, and memberships, with a lounge area and a menu featuring snacks and drinks available on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators provide realistic play and year-round access
Vibrant, high-energy atmosphere with neon colors and immersive lighting
